'''bozadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ataractic|ataractic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-z-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ataractic|ataractic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bozadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozadithi|bozadithi]] || [[word:bozadiji|bozadiji]] || [[word:bozadishi|bozadishi]] || [[word:bozadiki|bozadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozaduthuthu|bozaduthuthu]] || [[word:bozadujuju|bozadujuju]] || [[word:bozadushushu|bozadushushu]] || [[word:bozadukuku|bozadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozaduthu|bozaduthu]] || [[word:bozaduju|bozaduju]] || [[word:bozadushu|bozadushu]] || [[word:bozaduku|bozaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozadufthuf|bozadufthuf]] || [[word:bozadufjuf|bozadufjuf]] || [[word:bozadufshuf|bozadufshuf]] || [[word:bozadufkuf|bozadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozadethe|bozadethe]] || [[word:bozadeje|bozadeje]] || [[word:bozadeshe|bozadeshe]] || [[word:bozadeke|bozadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozadothotho|bozadothotho]] || [[word:bozadojojo|bozadojojo]] || [[word:bozadoshosho|bozadoshosho]] || [[word:bozadokoko|bozadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozadotho|bozadotho]] || [[word:bozadojo|bozadojo]] || [[word:bozadosho|bozadosho]] || [[word:bozadoko|bozadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozadofthof|bozadofthof]] || [[word:bozadofjof|bozadofjof]] || [[word:bozadofshof|bozadofshof]] || [[word:bozadofkof|bozadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfthĂŻf|bozadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfjĂŻf|bozadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfshĂŻf|bozadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfkĂŻf|bozadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|bozadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|bozadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|bozadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|bozadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfthĂŻf|bozadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfjĂŻf|bozadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfshĂŻf|bozadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfkĂŻf|bozadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfthĂŻf|bozadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfjĂŻf|bozadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfshĂŻf|bozadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:bozadĂŻfkĂŻf|bozadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bozadĂŠthĂŠ|bozadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bozadĂŠjĂŠ|bozadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bozadĂŠshĂŠ|bozadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bozadĂŠkĂŠ|bozadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bozadathatha|bozadathatha]] || [[word:bozadajaja|bozadajaja]] || [[word:bozadashasha|bozadashasha]] || [[word:bozadakaka|bozadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bozadatha|bozadatha]] || [[word:bozadaja|bozadaja]] || [[word:bozadasha|bozadasha]] || [[word:bozadaka|bozadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bozadafthaf|bozadafthaf]] || [[word:bozadafjaf|bozadafjaf]] || [[word:bozadafshaf|bozadafshaf]] || [[word:bozadafkaf|bozadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bozadasha|bozadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bozadshĂ«sha|bozadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bozadrosha|bozadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bozadmusha|bozadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bozadyasha|bozadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobozadnkshĂ«sha|gobozadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobozadnkrosha|gobozadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobozadnkmusha|gobozadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobozadnkyasha|gobozadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bozazadasha|bozazadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bozazadshĂ«sha|bozazadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bozazadrosha|bozazadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bozazadmusha|bozazadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bozazadyasha|bozazadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobozazadnkshĂ«sha|gobozazadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobozazadnkrosha|gobozazadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobozazadnkmusha|gobozazadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobozazadnkyasha|gobozazadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:bezĂŠdasha|bezĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bezĂŠdshĂ«sha|bezĂŠdshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bezĂŠdrosha|bezĂŠdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bezĂŠdmusha|bezĂŠdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bezĂŠdyasha|bezĂŠdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobezĂŠdnkshĂ«sha|gobezĂŠdnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobezĂŠdnkrosha|gobezĂŠdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobezĂŠdnkmusha|gobezĂŠdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobezĂŠdnkyasha|gobezĂŠdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bozfadasha|bozfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bozfadshĂ«sha|bozfadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bozfadrosha|bozfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bozfadmusha|bozfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bozfadyasha|bozfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobozfadnkshĂ«sha|gobozfadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobozfadnkrosha|gobozfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobozfadnkmusha|gobozfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobozfadnkyasha|gobozfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
